project_name: Pursuing Solutions - Pathways to the Future
archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalist contrast
design_philosophy: Engaging, relatable, and actionable for a Gen Z audience. Reject corporate sterility. Embrace 'Tactile Neo-Brutalism' — bold typography, chunky black borders, confident solid colors (Teal, Blue, Green, Red accents), and hard drop shadows. The design should feel like a digital sticker book mixed with a high-end productivity tool.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#111827]

surfaces_and_shadows.colored_card_teal: bg-[#00A896] text-white border-2 border-[#111827] rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#111827]
surfaces_and_shadows.colored_card_yellow: bg-[#FFD166] text-[#111827] border-2 border-[#111827] rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#111827]
surfaces_and_shadows.button_primary: bg-[#00A896] text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 border-2 border-[#111827] rounded-lg shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#111827] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0_0_#111827] transition-all duration-200 active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-[0_0_0_0_#111827]
surfaces_and_shadows.button_secondary: bg-white text-[#111827] font-bold px-6 py-3 border-2 border-[#111827] rounded-lg shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#111827] hover:bg-gray-50 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0_0_#111827] transition-all duration-200 active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-[0_0_0_0_#111827]

layout_and_spacing.section_padding: py-20 md:py-32 px-6 md:px-12 max-w-7xl mx-auto

brand_logo.description: Main brand logo for header and footer. Use object-contain and ensure it's wrapped in a border-2 neo-brutalist circle or rounded rect if suitable.

advisor_photo.description: Portrait of the Pathway Advisor for the booking section. Display inside a neo-brutalist card.

hero_image.description: Diverse students collaborating. Use as the main hero visual. Wrap in a heavy border with shadow.

feature_collaboration.description: Gen Z team working together creatively. Use in the 'How It Works' or 'Features' bento grid.

abstract_shape.description: Abstract fluid teal shape. Use as an absolute positioned decorative element behind cards or in empty spaces.

sections_instructions.Header: Solid white background. Thick bottom border (`border-b-2 border-black`). Logo on the left, primary navigation links center, 'Get Started' secondary button on the right. Links should have hover underline effects (thick offset underlines).
sections_instructions.Hero: Two-column layout. Left: Massive H1 typography ('Your Future. Decoded.'), followed by Gen Z tailored subtext. CTA Buttons: 'Take Free Assessment' (Primary) and 'Book a Call' (Secondary). Right: A neo-brutalist image frame holding `hero_image`, slightly rotated (-2deg) for a dynamic feel.
sections_instructions.Features_How_It_Works: A 'Bento Grid' layout. Step 1, 2, 3 displayed as distinct cards with massive numbers (e.g., '01', '02'). Use a mix of `colored_card_teal`, `colored_card_yellow`, and standard white cards. Emphasize the 'Research-backed assessment tools' here.
sections_instructions.Assessment_Preview: A highly interactive section (mocked). Show a visual representation of the assessment quiz. E.g., a card asking a career question with 3 chunky, clickable-looking answer options. This builds curiosity.
sections_instructions.Testimonials: Use `react-fast-marquee` for an endless scroll of student quotes. Cards should be heavily styled neo-brutalist blocks with the student portraits (`testimonial_student_1`, `testimonial_student_2`) in circular, thick-bordered avatars.
sections_instructions.Pricing: 3-tier pricing grid. Emphasize the middle plan by making it slightly taller, using `bg-[#028090] text-white`, and adding a 'Most Popular' bright yellow pill/badge at the top. Hard shadows on all.
sections_instructions.Book_Advisor_Call: Split layout. Left side: The advisor's pitch with `advisor_photo` in a bold frame. Right side: A mocked Microsoft Outlook Calendar iframe placeholder (a clean, neo-brutalist mocked UI of a calendar with selectable times).
sections_instructions.Footer: Massive text. Solid dark background (`bg-[#111827] text-white`). 'Ready to start pursuing solutions?' Add an email capture input field (white input, black text, thick border) with a bright accent submit button.

technical_requirements.testing: All interactive elements must include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='take-assessment-hero-btn'`).
technical_requirements.icons: Use `lucide-react` with bold `strokeWidth={2.5}` to match the neo-brutalist chunkiness.
technical_requirements.components: Use custom HTML/Tailwind for the main layouts. If using Shadcn (e.g., for forms/inputs), override the default Vercel-like thin borders with `border-2 border-[#111827] shadow-[2px_2px_0_0_#111827]`.
